message:
test: thread cancel reason through Cancelling/Finalizing states and add drive_cancel helper

Updates all semantic test suites to reflect the formal semantics change where
Cancelling and Finalizing states now carry the cancel reason:

- tests/semantic_adr_regression.rs: adds drive_cancel_from_requested() helper
  that drives CancelRequested → Cancelling(reason) → Finalizing(reason) →
  Completed(Cancelled(reason)) in one call, reducing boilerplate across all
  ADR regression tests; updated all oracle transitions to pass reason

- tests/semantic_conformance_harness.rs: updated conformance transitions for
  reason-carrying states; restructured oracle assertion sequences

- tests/semantic_golden_fixture_validation.rs: golden fixtures updated for
  new state shape

- tests/semantic_tla_scenarios.rs: updated TLA+ scenario properties for
  new MaskBounded, MaskMonotone, CancelIdempotence, ReplyLinearity, and
  RegistryLease invariants

- tests/semantic_lean_regression.rs: updated Lean regression assertions for
  extended CancelKind variants and tightened preconditions

- tests/semantic_log_schema_validation.rs: expanded log schema field checks
- tests/semantic_verification_runner.rs: updated runner expectations
- tests/semantic_witness_replay_e2e.rs: updated witness replay assertions
- tests/semantic_docs_lint.rs, semantic_docs_rule_mapping_lint.rs: minor

- tests/adversarial_witness_corpus.rs: rustfmt only (import ordering,
  assert macro formatting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
